title: Create Real-Time Morty Tracking Dashboard
description: Build the Agent Monitor view showing all active claude subprocess agents in real-time. Display grid of AgentCards with: agent name/ID, current ticket title, status (spawning/working/idle/error), elapsed time, stdout preview. Include master controls: pause all, resume all, terminate all. Show aggregate stats.
acceptance_criteria: Grid layout displays all active agents as AgentCards
Cards update in real-time via WebSocket events
Status indicators: green dot (working), yellow (idle), red (error)
Elapsed time updates every second for working agents
stdout preview shows last 3 lines of output, scrollable
Click card opens full output modal with copy button
Header shows aggregate: X active, Y completed, Z errors
Master controls: Pause All, Resume All, Terminate All buttons
Portal animation plays when new agent spawns
agent_output: Real-time Morty tracking with enhanced agent cards showing current tool, last output, and session detail panel with event log.
